chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 342 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7335/2023 (C/A) 31.01.2024 Mr. Shoaib Niaz Khaskheli, Advocate for petitioners/applicants. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Rukhsar Shahani, Principal, Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh has filed a statement along with certain documents. We have heard the parties. Learned AAG submits that due to stay order granted by this Court in Suits No.1493 & 1322 of 2023, all the appointments have been stopped, and more so, new advertisements inviting applications from the candidates have not been published yet. No case of contempt, therefore, in terms of listed application is made out. Accordingly, the same is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
